text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Dear me, who's that crying over there? ...Maki?
Whatever is the matter?

text_block_list.name: Maki
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Please don't mind me. Hang in there,
Bright... And someday, let's play together again,
lots and lots, just like we used to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Maki. Please... watch over me for just a
little longer.
